exit_code.description: Exit code of the operation (0 = success)

artifact_digest.description: SHA256 of artifact actually applied (for drift detection)

skill_version.description: Prompt/skill contract version used by the actor

session_id.description: Run/session boundary identifier (should match the prescribe session_id)

operation_id.description: Operation identifier, unique within a session

parent_span_id.description: Parent span for hierarchical agent workflows

external_refs.description: External reference links (e.g. GitHub run ID, Jira ticket)
